tiktok.caption: 67% of gym memberships are never used — and gyms literally designed it that way on purpose

youtube_short.title: 67% of Gym Members Never Go (By Design)
title_alternatives: Your Gym Is Betting You Never Show Up
The $696 Gym Trap Nobody Talks About
youtube_short.description: Two out of three gym memberships are completely unused — and that's not a bug, it's the feature. Gyms like Planet Fitness pack 6,500 members into spaces built for 300. They need you to stay home. We break down the purchase-intention psychology behind it and the one-question test that tells you whether to cancel today. #moneytips #personalfinance #gymtrap #moneypsychology

hook_line: 67% of gym members never go — and gyms built the business model around it
